overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a path toward a medieval stone gate, crossing a cobblestone bridge over water, and entering a village. The scene features bright sunny weather with clear skies and historic European-style architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the stone gatehouse

entered.detail: large medieval stone gate with archway and red roof
unpaved dirt trail leading to the gate
medieval castle towers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open countryside toward a large stone gatehouse. The scene is bright and sunny with grassy hills on either side and a distant castle visible on the horizon.

events.description: entering the dark stone archway of the gatehouse from open countryside

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway tunnel beneath the gatehouse

entered.detail: dark stone tunnel with cobblestone floor passing through the gatehouse
rough stone walls of the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The camera follows Geralt as he enters the dark stone archway of the gatehouse. The environment shifts from bright open countryside to a shadowed, enclosed tunnel with cobblestone flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone bridge over water with watch tower

events.description: exiting the gate tunnel onto a sunlit cobblestone bridge

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge toward the watch tower, passing guards in red armor

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing at attention with halberd

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge with wooden railings spanning the river
dark wooden fence railings along the bridge sides
calm water visible below the bridge on both sides
tall square stone tower at the end of the bridge
medieval town with red roofs visible beyond the bridge

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the gate onto a sunlit cobblestone bridge spanning a river. He passes guards in red armor standing watch as he approaches a tall stone tower at the bridge's end, with a medieval town visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entry with stone and timber buildings

events.description: entering the village area with wooden buildings and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the village outskirts past timber-framed houses and flags

notable_agents.action: villager in white clothing near wooden stairs

entered.detail: timber-framed medieval houses with wooden balconies
external wooden staircase attached to stone building
red and black banners on poles along the street
simple wooden post fences lining the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a medieval village with timber-framed houses and stone buildings. Red flags flutter on poles along the cobblestone street as he walks past wooden stairs and fences, with villagers visible near the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural outskirts with trees and river views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cobblestone path through rural outskirts with trees and fences

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees lining the path
small wooden houses with thatched or shingled roofs

segments.scene_description: The path continues through rural outskirts flanked by wooden fences and tall trees. The village buildings fall behind as Geralt walks toward distant cottages, with the river visible to the left and open sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched countryside through a fortified gateway and into a bustling medieval village. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by grassy hills toward a large stone gatehouse, with a distant castle visible on the horizon. As he enters the gatehouse, the bright light vanishes, shifting the environment into a shadowed, enclosed tunnel with cobblestone flooring. The scene then opens back into the sunlight as he emerges onto a cobblestone bridge spanning a river, passing guards in red armor before entering a village filled with timber-framed houses and fluttering red flags. Finally, the camera follows him past the village buildings and wooden fences, moving toward distant cottages as the river remains visible to the left under a clear sky.
